rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF GEORGINA LAXMI LOREK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/7/26. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The attorney fee declaration that is part of the "supplement" filed on 12/9/25 AMENDED the attorney fees and costs. An amendment requires notice. [CRC 7.3 and 7.53(a).] Why did the attorneys bill for time spent in connection with a trust? Whose trust? Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 3/24/26. (The representative capacity of the petition is Guardian, not "Petitioner.") Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN CLARENCE SCOTT
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared or addressed. (1) The Creditor's Claim should have been formally rejected in writing at the time of filing, as required by Prob. Code sec. 9250. While the petition states that Alex Mak Energy's claim was not properly served to the petitioner or her attorney, the proof of mailing shows it was sent on 8/15/2024. (2) The petition alleges that US Bank's claim has been satisfied (at reduced payment); however, there is no written satisfaction or allowance form on file. (3) Amended petition requires a notice of hearing. CRC 7.53. Proof of service appears to be insufficient. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Granted per written order. (Administrator clearly did take actions under her IAEA authority, as there are no securities remaining on hand. A proposed order should not have an exhibit attached to it; the judge's signature must always be on the last page of an order.)

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF PEGGY LYNCH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Authorization To Return Assets To Trust, Including Conservatees Interest In Apn 249-48-012 Commonly Known As 235 E. Julian In San Jose, Ca; To Effectuate Any And All Documents As Needed
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The petition seeks court approval to transfer assets from individual ownership to a new trust for the conservatee's benefit under Prob. Code 850, but this section does not seem applicable here. A supplement was filed on 11/17/2025 to address the issues identified in the tentative ruling for the 11/18/2025 hearing. The Court will determine whether the allegation is sufficient. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
